untranslatable_reason: This signal requires beta estimation (OLS or Scholes-Williams regression) and cross-sectional ranking across a universe of stocks to construct a market-neutral long/short factor portfolio. The allowed indicators list contains only single-stock technical indicators (RSI, MACD, moving averages, etc.) and does not include: (1) beta calculation capabilities, (2) cross-sectional ranking functions, (3) portfolio construction methods, or (4) universe-wide rebalancing logic. BAB factor construction is a quantitative multi-stock strategy that cannot be expressed using point-in-time single-stock technical conditions.
translation_notes: Signal SSRN_2049939_12 is a factor-based portfolio strategy requiring statistical estimation and portfolio-level operations beyond the scope of single-indicator rule translation. This should be implemented in a dedicated factor engine or custom backtesting module with beta estimation and rebalancing mechanics, not as a sequence of indicator-based entry/exit rules.
